title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's research team presents the training pipeline for Composer 2, starting from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active) with coding-focused continued pre-training. Long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install bootstrapping is combined with nonlinear length penalty reward shaping and self-summarization to handle context limits.
